data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where a persona onboards new staff with a corporate template. However, the evidence provided does not include any API endpoints or functionality that confirm this scenario can be executed or validated. The linked use cases and prior steps indicate gaps in the necessary functionality, leading to an inconclusive status for this exploratory step.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoint or functionality for onboarding new staff with a corporate template.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the onboarding functionality.
